testcase.name: Root_Still_Returns_200_After_Other_Calls
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root still returns 200 after other calls given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0002091s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.006204s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.388e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Second_Root_Check
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Second root check given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001318s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.0009332s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.886e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_Endpoint_Returns_200_With_Empty_List_After_Reset
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items endpoint returns 200 with empty list after reset given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001121s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.0008461s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.005e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Two_Items_And_List_Them
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create two items and list them given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.108e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.000999s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.196e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0008342s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.506e-05s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.000864s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.101e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_First_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get first item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000104s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001011s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.91e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.000906s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.529e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Second_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get second item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.988e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007548s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.695e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0006781s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.505e-05s when I GET "/items/2" ... Status.passed in 0.0008271s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.292e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login as charlie given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001111s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001451s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.101e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: Secure_With_Invalid_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with invalid bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.704e-05s when I request GET "/secure" with Authorization "Bearer invalid-token" ... Status.passed in 0.0009811s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.719e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Malformed_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with malformed bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.489e-05s when I request GET "/admin" with Authorization "not-bearer xyz" ... Status.passed in 0.000855s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Missing_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.416e-05s when I DELETE "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0008399s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

scenario: Get missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.704e-05s when I GET "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0007601s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.6e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Default_Username_Path
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login default username path given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.988e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.00107s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.934e-05s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 4.029e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
